title: SigningAlgorithm enum missing #[non_exhaustive]
description: secretx-core lib:641 — SigningAlgorithm has no #[non_exhaustive] annotation. Adding a new algorithm (e.g. Ed448, P-384) is a semver-breaking change because downstream code can match it exhaustively. P-384 is the next most likely addition. Fix: add #[non_exhaustive] before 0.1.0 ships. Fixing it after is a semver break.
